name: mila
description: Mila is a multilingual AI meeting notes assistant for live and uploaded conversations.

scripts.dev:asr:setup: cd apps/asr-worker && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev:asr:native: pnpm dev:asr:setup && cd apps/asr-worker && WHISPER_MODEL=${WHISPER_MODEL:-tiny} WHISPER_PRELOAD=${WHISPER_PRELOAD:-true} WHISPER_COMPUTE_TYPE=${WHISPER_COMPUTE_TYPE:-int8} WHISPER_BEAM_SIZE=${WHISPER_BEAM_SIZE:-1} WHISPER_CPU_THREADS=${WHISPER_CPU_THREADS:-8} WHISPER_VAD_FILTER=${WHISPER_VAD_FILTER:-false} .venv/bin/uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 9000
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @mila/shared build && pnpm --filter @mila/api build && pnpm --filter @mila/web build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @mila/shared build && pnpm --filter @mila/api lint && pnpm --filter @mila/web lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @mila/shared test && pnpm --filter @mila/api test && pnpm --filter @mila/electron test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @mila/shared build && pnpm --filter @mila/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @mila/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @mila/electron typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
